market_brief.summary_en: Markets closed in constructive regime at 65.1/100 as SPY rose 1.04% to $746.74 and QQQ rose 2.51% to $740.62 amid 7 and 6 distribution days respectively.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $462.12 up 6.94% yesterday trading above all EMAs with EMA200 at $339.47 rising and GC above. Stage2 6/7 with RS 100.0 near 52-week high of $465.38 forms strong setup. Strong positioning as key AI chip foundry with capacity expansion and consistent revenue growth highlighted across discussions.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Break above $465.38 targets extension with ATR14 $20.86
